pokemon:oinkologne.name: Oinkologne
pokemon:oinkologne.summary: Oinkologne is proud of its fine, glossy skin. It emits a concentrated scent from the tip of its tail.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Oinkologne is proud of its fine, glossy skin. It emits a concentrated scent from the tip of its tail.
It entrances female Pokémon with the sweet, alluring scent that wafts from all over its body.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Oinkologne is proud of its fine, glossy skin. It emits a concentrated scent from the tip of its tail.

pokemon:lechonk.name: Lechonk
pokemon:lechonk.summary: It searches for food all day. It possesses a keen sense of smell but doesn’t use it for anything other than foraging.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It searches for food all day. It possesses a keen sense of smell but doesn’t use it for anything other than foraging.
This Pokémon spurns all but the finest of foods. Its body gives off an herblike scent that bug Pokémon detest.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It searches for food all day. It possesses a keen sense of smell but doesn’t use it for anything other than foraging.
